pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect boolean literal passed as flag to put_UE_in_freelist

### Summary
The `rx_sdu` function in the LTE MAC UL scheduler incorrectly passes a boolean `true` as the third parameter to `put_UE_in_freelist()`, but the function expects a numeric flag value. This occurs in the Random Access failure handling path when Msg3 HARQ retransmissions exceed the configured maximum. While `true` typically evaluates to `1`, using a boolean literal for a flag parameter is semantically incorrec
